scripts.build: npm run build:css && babel src --out-dir dist --extensions .js,.jsx

scripts.build:packages: npm run build:workflow && npm run build:agent && npm run build:studio
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && npm install && npm run build:packages

npm run build:css && babel src --out-dir dist --extensions .js,.jsx

scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend ; npm run lint:types ; npm run lint:backend

scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.install-all-browsers: npx playwright install chromium firefox webkit

scripts.lint: pnpm -s run lint:js && pnpm -s run lint:py
scripts.format: pnpm -w -s run format:js && pnpm -s run format:py

scripts.verify:node: pnpm build:node && pnpm typecheck:node && pnpm test:node

scripts.typecheck: echo 'android app managed outside TypeScript workspace'
echo "No TypeScript sources in world portal"

scripts.check:circular: madge --circular --extensions ts apps/zeaz-api/src services/wallet-engine/src services/swap-engine/src services/indexer/src packages/crypto-core/src packages/chain-adapters/src packages/shared-types/src
